query:
SELECT 
  COUNT(*) as total_variants,
  SUM(CASE WHEN packageLength IS NULL OR packageWidth IS NULL OR packageHeight IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as missing_dimensions,
  SUM(CASE WHEN packageLength IS NOT NULL AND packageWidth IS NOT NULL AND packageHeight IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as has_dimensions,
  SUM(CASE WHEN grossWeight IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as missing_gross_weight,
  SUM(CASE WHEN netWeight IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as missing_net_weight,
  SUM(CASE WHEN piecesPerBox IS NULL OR piecesPerBox = 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as missing_pieces_per_box
FROM product_variants;
